Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics

Class FlixelGraphicSource

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics.FlixelGraphicSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelSource<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture>, FlixelWrapperSource<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture,FlixelGraphic>
public final class FlixelGraphicSource extends Object implements FlixelWrapperSource<com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture,FlixelGraphic>
Cached graphic "source" (asset) that can provide a pooled FlixelGraphic wrapper.

Ownership is explicit: get() does not retain, while acquire() retains.

Uses generic FlixelAssetManager.obtainWrapper(String, Class) via FlixelWrapperSource; the loaded texture is required with FlixelSource.require(FlixelAssetManager) (same as requireTexture(FlixelAssetManager)).

    • get

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelGraphic get()
      Returns the pooled wrapper for this asset key (does not retain).

    • acquire

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelGraphic acquire()
      Returns the pooled wrapper and retains it (explicit ownership).

    • requireTexture

      @NotNull public @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture requireTexture(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelAssetManager assets)
      Requires the underlying texture to already be loaded, then returns it.

      Equivalent to FlixelSource.require(FlixelAssetManager).
